overall.description: A ship simulation game depicting a first-person view from a vessel's bridge at night. The ship navigates steadily through dark harbor waters, approaching and passing industrial dock structures while illuminated navigation displays show radar sweep and chart data overhead.

events.description: industrial dock structure becomes visible on the right side as the ship approaches the harbor entrance

agents.ego_description: piloting the ship forward through the harbor while monitoring the radar and navigation displays overhead

entered.detail: three-screen navigation setup with chart, radar, and depth sounder displays showing yellow radar sweep
red-painted bow structure of the ship visible through the forward bridge windows
dark water surface illuminated by the ship's forward lights
industrial concrete or metal dock structure emerging from the darkness on the starboard side

segments.scene_description: From the ship's bridge, the camera moves steadily forward through dark harbor waters at night. The navigation display array glows overhead with active radar sweeping, while the red bow deck is visible through the windows. Around the 4-second mark, a large industrial dock structure becomes visible on the right as the vessel approaches the harbor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dock channel with industrial structures

events.description: ship enters the narrow channel between dock structures with walls visible on both sides
ship exits the narrow dock channel back to open water as structures pass behind

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering the vessel through the confined dock passage while monitoring proximity to structures

entered.detail: dark industrial dock wall or pier structure visible on the port side

segments.scene_description: The ship navigates through a narrow industrial dock channel with concrete structures visible on both sides. The right dock pier passes by closely before falling behind, while a dark structure emerges on the left. The navigation displays continue showing radar data as the vessel carefully transits the confined waterway before emerging back into open water around the 10-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor waters after dock passage

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through unobstructed harbor waters after successfully passing the dock structures

entered.detail: unobstructed dark water path extending forward into the distance

segments.scene_description: Having cleared the dock channel, the ship continues through open harbor waters with no structures visible on either side. The bridge remains illuminated by the glow of the navigation displays overhead, and the radar continues its steady sweep as the vessel maintains course through the dark, calm water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a ship's bridge as it navigates from open harbor waters through a confined industrial channel and back into the dark expanse. It begins with the vessel gliding through the night, the red bow deck visible through the windows while glowing navigation displays and a sweeping radar array illuminate the overhead space. As the ship approaches the harbor entrance, a large industrial dock structure appears on the right, leading the camera into a narrow channel flanked by concrete piers. The scene then shifts as the vessel carefully transits this confined waterway, passing a dark structure on the left before the concrete walls recede. Finally, the ship emerges from the channel and continues its steady course through calm, open water under the persistent glow of the bridge instruments.
